task: Compute MLR per PPACA §2718 and 45 CFR §158: MLR = (incurred_claims + quality_improvement_expense) / (premium_revenue - taxes_fees). If MLR < threshold (80% individual+small_group, 85% large_group), rebate_owed = (threshold - MLR) * (premium_revenue - taxes_fees). Per-member rebate = rebate_owed_total / member_months * 12. Output: { mlr_numerator, mlr_denominator, mlr_ratio, threshold, rebate_owed_total, per_member_rebate, market, state, reporting_year }.

recipes.name: mlr-rebate
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var i=(input&&typeof input==='object')?input:{};var r=(lib&&lib.pack&&lib.pack.rules)||{};var T=(r.mlr_thresholds)||{individual:0.80,small_group:0.80,large_group:0.85};var mk=String(i.market||'individual');var th=(T[mk]!=null)?T[mk]:0.80;var pr=Number(i.premium_revenue||0);var ic=Number(i.incurred_claims||0);var qi=Number(i.quality_improvement_expense||0);var tx=Number(i.taxes_fees||0);var mm=Number(i.member_months||0);var num=ic+qi;var den=pr-tx;var ratio=den>0?(num/den):0;var rebate=0;if(den>0&&ratio<th){rebate=(th-ratio)*den;}var per=mm>0?(rebate/mm*12):0;return {market:mk,state:String(i.state||''),reporting_year:Number(i.reporting_year||0),mlr_numerator:num,mlr_denominator:den,mlr_ratio:Math.round(ratio*10000)/10000,threshold:th,rebate_owed_total:Math.round(rebate*100)/100,per_member_rebate:Math.round(per*100)/100};}

pack.description: PPACA §2718 + 45 CFR §158 MLR thresholds, numerator definition, and rebate distribution formula. Thresholds are the statutory floors codified in 45 CFR §158.211; the numerator definition follows 45 CFR §158.221.
